answer:
Alright, so, hands down, my favorite season of the year has got to be fall. You know, there’s just something about autumn that hits differently. When the leaves start changing colors and the air gets a little crisp, it's like everything feels fresh and cozy at the same time. Honestly, the weather is pretty much perfect—not too hot, not too cold. Sweater weather is my jam, and I love being able to throw on a hoodie or a flannel without sweating or freezing.

As for activities, fall is packed with things I look forward to. I’m really into hiking, and walking through trails covered with golden leaves is absolutely stunning. Pumpkin patches are a must—I can’t resist picking out pumpkins, sipping hot apple cider, and maybe even going on a hayride with friends. Oh, and let’s not forget football season! Watching games on weekends, tailgating, and munching on snacks—it’s kind of a tradition in my family.

Overall, there’s just this vibe in the air during fall: people are getting excited for the holidays, everything smells like cinnamon and spice, and it just feels really comforting. It’s definitely the season that I look forward to every year.
title:
Talk about your favorite season of the year. 
Which season is your favorite? 
Describe the weather during this season. 
What are some special activities you enjoy doing at that time of year?
extData:
{"pronuncFile":"/20251027/1d9afe44de244b87a72bc7c5b1e80026.mp3","answerTemplate":"Opening Statement:  
Begin by stating your preference clearly:  
"My favorite season of the year is definitely [season], because I really enjoy the [specific aspect, e.g., weather/activities/mood] during this time."

Body:  
Describe the weather:  
"During [season], the weather is usually [describe weather, e.g., warm and sunny/cool and breezy/cold and snowy/rainy], which makes me feel [emotion or mood, e.g., energized/relaxed/cozy]."

Talk about special activities:  
"There are several activities that I love to do in [season]. For example, I often [list activity, e.g., go swimming/have picnics/celebrate holidays/go hiking/visit the beach]."  
"[Activity] is particularly enjoyable because [reason, e.g., the environment is perfect/the atmosphere is festive/I get to spend time with friends and family]."

Share a personal experience (optional):  
"One memorable experience I had during [season] was when I [describe event or activity], which made me appreciate this season even more."

Conclusion:  
Summarize your feelings about the season:  
"To sum up, [season] is my favorite time of year mainly because of the [weather/activities/special memories] it offers."  
End with a final thought:  
"I'm always looking forward to [season] and all the wonderful experiences it brings."","titleTranslate":"谈谈你一年中最喜欢的季节。
